title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 92.180 - Wage brackets may be established
text:
92.180.  Wage brackets may be established. — In order to facilitate the collection of the tax herein authorized any such city may by ordinance create wage brackets within which the tax shall be uniform for taxpayers entitled to the same number of exemptions.
(Reenacted L. 1953 2d Ex. Sess. p. 14 § 8)
